docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE NATIONAL COLLECTION AGENCY,INC., A CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT SCARDACCI, PALMRIS TONY AKA TONY SCARDACCI DBA TONY'S CIGAR
